overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a post-apocalyptic wilderness. The character traverses grassy riverbanks and shallow waters while approaching a wooden bridge, with large mechanical structures and snow-capped mountains visible in the distance under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank with prominent dead tree formation

events.description: character begins turning left to follow the riverbank curve

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along grassy terrain beside a river, passing a large dead tree formation on the right

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree atop a rocky red outcrop
tall mechanical structure with glowing red elements atop a hill
mountain range with snow-covered peaks in the background
tall thin pine trees with sparse foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a grassy riverbank in a post-apocalyptic landscape. A distinctive dead tree formation stands prominently on a rocky outcrop to the right, while snow-capped mountains and a large mechanical tower are visible in the distance. The character moves steadily forward, passing the tree formation as the camera follows from a third-person perspective.

events.description: dead tree formation exits view as character moves past it
wooden bridge structure comes into view in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank toward a large mechanical tower, with the terrain transitioning from grass to dirt and rock near the water's edge

entered.detail: rustic wooden fortification or bridge made of logs and planks

segments.scene_description: Having passed the dead tree formation, the character continues along the riverbank with the water now closer on the right. The large mechanical tower becomes more prominent in the center view, and a wooden bridge structure appears in the distance. The terrain transitions from grass to rocky dirt as the character approaches the water's edge.

events.description: character steps from riverbank into shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water toward a wooden bridge structure, with water reaching up to the character's knees

entered.detail: moss-covered boulder partially submerged in the river
rocks visible beneath the clear water surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through clear water toward the wooden bridge ahead. The water reveals submerged rocks beneath the surface, and a large mossy boulder becomes prominent on the left. The mechanical tower remains visible in the background as the character approaches the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character traverses a grassy riverbank that gradually transitions into a shallow waterway leading toward a distant bridge. It begins with the character walking past a distinctive dead tree on a rocky outcrop, with snow-capped mountains and a large mechanical tower framing the distant horizon. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from lush grass to rocky dirt while the mechanical tower becomes more prominent in the center of the view. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the bank and wades into the clear, shallow river, passing a large mossy boulder on the left. Finally, the camera follows the character through the water, revealing submerged rocks beneath the surface as they approach the wooden bridge structure.
